title_en: Win a Trip to Experience Universal Studios Hollywood, Fast & Furious: Hollywood Drift! - IGN
body_en:
IGN Rewards is partnering with Universal to give you and a guest a trip to Universal Studios Hollywood to feel the rush of adrenaline on Fast & Furious: Hollywood Drift, the new first-ever, high speed outdoor roller coaster.
Featuring groundbreaking 360-degree rotation of the individual ride vehicles that create a seamless sensation of drifting cars as they spin in motion at furiously fast speeds, experience the heart-pounding thrill of the Fast & Furious universe like never before.
One lucky Grand Prize winner will win a trip for four to Universal Studios Hollywood to feel the rush.
This giveaway is set to end on June 25 at 12:00 PM PST. Don't miss your opportunity to score an incredible vacation package!
IGN Rewards is a free platform that allows IGN readers to access free giveaways, discounts, and offers. You'll only need to create an IGN account to be eligible for the program. If you'd like to further your IGN Rewards experience, you can check out IGN Plus , where you can earn monthly games, ad-free browsing, and so much more.
